entry.title: Action without Attraction
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,582Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 7

Summary: Aroace Merlin and aromantic Gwaine are friends with benefits, using sex for stress relief, physical pleasure and emotional comfort.Arthur is asexual and very in love with Merlin.This seems like a recipe for disaster, but can they make it work?

entry.title: To Wage Against Time, Heart, and Death
entry.summary:
Author: RedPanda25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,976Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 10

Summary: The narration of Arthur's thoughts while he knows that he is dying in the ending of the series. Merlin is there. Has always been there and it is only now that Arthur is dying that he truly realizes how much Merlin has done. And how much Arthur loves Merlin.

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Prophecy of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: HarmonyOfTheSpheres

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,402Chapters: 1/23Kudos: 22

Summary: Merlin is missing, Voldemort has returned, and somehow, Harry has been chosen as a Triwizard champion despite never putting his name in the Goblet of Fire in the first place. Which would all be bad enough as it is, except for the fact that there’s also something terribly wrong with magic. Now Harry must not only find Merlin and stop Voldemort before he can fully rise to power, but also survive in a tournament where each task is becoming increasingly dangerous and magically unstable. As spells start to go awry and Voldemort becomes more desperate than ever, Harry and Arthur must work together to restore magic to the land—before it’s too late.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Time
entry.summary:
Author: HarmonyOfTheSpheres

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,104Chapters: 21/21Kudos: 777

Summary: Merlin has returned to Hogwarts for his second year as the History of Magic professor, and this time he is determined to find a way to destroy the horcrux within Harry before it's too late. It's not exactly a simple task, however, especially with an escaped convict on the loose and dementors lurking around Hogwarts' grounds. So when Merlin finally gets a chance to change Harry's fate, he takes it.A bit of time travel is surely worth the risk if it will save Harry's life—isn't it?

entry.title: the ghost come back
entry.summary:
Author: indigotigress7

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,338Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 96

Summary: Twenty-first-century Merlin, tired of waiting for Arthur to return, travels back in time determined to make the best of a second chance in Camelot.(Gaius, still reeling from watching his nephew drink from a poisoned chalice and nearly perish from its effects, is almost too relieved that Merlin has woken up at all to notice how strangely he’s behaving.)(Almost.)

entry.title: in sickness and health
entry.summary:
Author: deniigiq

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,765Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 95

Summary: “Are you battling again with the green-eyed monster, sire?” Leon asks.“No," Arthur says.“Are you sure?”“Yes.”“So this is a new method of celebration?”“Yes.”“…are you su—”“Yes, Leon. I’m sure.” (In which Merlin almost gets married and Leon shepherds the fall-out of that to its natural conclusion.)

entry.title: The lines crossed
entry.summary:
Author: Trialbyname

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,696Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 231

Summary: “Hi,” Nick, who had so far been sitting leant back in his chair, moved forward, “How has your day been?” “It’s been fine,” Charlie let out a small breath, “How about you?” “I’d say that it just got a little bit brighter.” “Oh my god,” Charlie was shaking his head, still smiling, “That one was cringe.” “I know,” Nick laughed, running a hand through his hair, “But I thought it was worth a shot.” Charlies eyes met with Nicks, and it was like nothing else mattered anymore. Each noise that surrounded them was blocked out by their own little moment. Charlie could almost have believed that there was no one there, except for them. There was no one left in the world, except for him and Nick. And a strange lady who was standing by the windows. ---Nick and Charlie has to take on the identities of Prince Arthur and his manservant Merlin, when they wake up in Camelot. Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin have to take on the identities of teenage couple, Nick and Charlie, while they try and find out how to get back to Camelot.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: a taught reflex
entry.summary:
Author: qigiined

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,412Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 34

Summary: Ygraine’s blood is taken downstairs. She doesn’t want Arthur to see her bare arm. It’s too intimate. It doesn’t matter what the result of the test is, she knows she doesn’t know him.Her mum opens the envelope for her when it comes because she can’t bear to do it herself. Mum and Ector sit on the one side of the purple table in Ygraine’s grey little, sad little flat and read while she buries herself in her arms and dread on the other side.Mum puts the letter down on the table. No one speaks until Ygraine cannot stifle her sobs any longer. She never asked for a son. (King Arthur returns in the modern era. Soon after, Ygraine's not-quite-ex husband announces that he is the guy's father and he is willing to take a blood test to prove it. When the test comes back positive, Ygraine is forced to make space in her life for a son she can't remember and never actually wanted to have.)

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,129Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 66

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

entry.title: Lost to All But Time
entry.summary:
Author: a_written_simulacra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,898Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 68

Summary: Merlin has waited beside the lake for over 1,500 years, and when he finally gets a visitor, it's not Arthur Pendragon--but an eccentric English man who arrives in a blue telephone box, calls himself the Doctor, and claims that not only is time travel real, but it's absolutely imperative that Merlin go back in time with him--back to the age of Camelot where Prince Arthur is very much alive.

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,900Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: His Majesty My King
entry.summary:
Author: Bollsye

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,290Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 85

Summary: Arthur’s hand clenched into a fist, his entire body coiled like a drawn blade. Water dripped steadily from his armor, pooling at his feet, but he stood tall despite it every inch a king, the people could feel it in his energy.But his eyesHis eyes betrayed him.Confusion. Disbelief. The dawning realization that nothing before him made sense.The lake behind him was calm.Too calm.As if it had never held him at all.Arthur swallowed hard, his voice lower now, edged with something far more uncertain.“…Merlin?”No one answered.And the crowd only grew. ---------------------------* Or Arthur has finally returned and English is hard

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,669Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: thank you, i guess (i'm not sorry but i might grow to regret it)
entry.summary:
Author: asteroided

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,889Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: She said "You taste like my ex." I said "Thank you, I guess." In which for one night, and one night only, Arthur Pendragon watches his world come crashing down around him.

  • they’re at cambridge if anyone is curious
  • Not Canon Compliant
  • canon out the window really

entry.title: Golden Hair/Golden Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,821Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 201

Summary: A rewriting of the series where Arthur discovers Merlin's magic way earlier. It will follow the series where it can and diverge as needed, with some fun little scenes inspired by Tumblr posts.This begins in the aftermath of the battle for Ealdor. Also don’t forget to check out part 2 of the series. It has additional backstory and plot.

entry.title: The End (Fragmented)
entry.summary:
Author: thatonetheatrekid14

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,458Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: my favorite lil snippets of merlin and arthur (and gwen and gaius, and morgana) from the last episode of the series in word form bc i looooove subtext :)enjoy! !!!NEW ADDITION COMING SOON STAY TUNED!!!during one of those voice commentary thingies katie mcgrath talked about how she would have wrote the end of the battle of camlann, and it is so so so so so BEAUTIFULso lemme go write that real quick(once i finish the series)

entry.title: Playing with Power
entry.summary:
Author: ToibiLuci

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,185Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: Merlin is about to kill innocent people. To stop him, Arthur threatens to take his own life.   A study on Merthur and the scales of power in their relationship, except I make them both a bit more morally skewed for it to be possible.

entry.title: there’s an open door that can lead me to forever
entry.summary:
Author: mrsrumbles

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,317Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 61

Summary: Arthur grows up with Merlin in Ealdor. One day, Camelot’s knights arrive to tell him he’s their prince. “Are you really a prince?” Merlin wondered quietly.”It’s mad.”“Their emblem is a dragon.”Arthur froze and turned around to look at him. “Do you think that might mean something?”
